experience_range.note: Range is indicative; judgment and depth matter more than raw years. Candidates outside the band will be considered if other signals are strong.

location.office_days: Tue/Thu in Noida and Pune offices; no fixed cadence required

role_mission.primary_goal: Own the intelligence layer of Redrob's product — ranking, retrieval, and matching systems that determine what recruiters see when searching for candidates and what candidates see when searching for roles

hard_requirements.detail: Must have deployed to real users and managed embedding drift, index refresh, and retrieval-quality regression in production — not just prototype or tutorial-level use
Operational experience required — understand the tradeoffs, not just API familiarity
Strong Python with code quality discipline — this role writes production code, not demos
Must have designed and run evaluation frameworks for ranking systems, not just awareness of the metrics

examples: technical blog posts with systems depth

hard_disqualifiers.condition: Pure research background with no production deployment
hard_disqualifiers.detail: Academic labs or research-only roles without shipping to real users. Redrob has tried this twice and it failed both times — this is an explicit hiring lesson, not a preference.

hard_disqualifiers.condition: AI experience is primarily recent (<12 months) LangChain/OpenAI wrapper projects
hard_disqualifiers.detail: Unless the candidate can demonstrate substantial pre-LLM-era ML production experience. Looking for people who understood retrieval and ranking before it became fashionable.

hard_disqualifiers.condition: Has not written production code in the last 18 months
hard_disqualifiers.detail: Applies to candidates who have moved into architecture-only or tech-lead-only roles. This role writes code.

strong_negative_signals.condition: Entire career at consulting/services firms with no product-company experience
strong_negative_signals.nuance: Currently at one of these firms is acceptable if prior product-company experience exists

strong_negative_signals.condition: Primary expertise in CV/speech/robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure
strong_negative_signals.detail: Would require re-learning retrieval and ranking fundamentals from scratch

strong_negative_signals.condition: 5+ years exclusively on closed-source systems with no external validation
strong_negative_signals.detail: No papers, talks, open-source, or other signal of how they think

strong_negative_signals.threshold: Average tenure <1.5–2 years across career, with moves driven by title progression rather than impact
strong_negative_signals.detail: Redrob needs someone planning a 3+ year tenure

strong_negative_signals.condition: Framework enthusiast profile without systems thinking evidence
strong_negative_signals.detail: GitHub full of LangChain tutorials and 'How I used [hot framework]' posts without evidence of reasoning about systems, tradeoffs, or scale

behavioral_requirements.detail: Willing to ship a working ranker in a week even if ML is 'obviously suboptimal'; must tilt toward shipper
Must engage with recruiter workflows and eval frameworks, not just code
Async-first team that writes a lot; if writing is painful, the role will be painful

behavioral_requirements.trait: Comfort with open disagreement and fast decisions

preferred_archetype: Applied ML engineer who ships products

positive: Recent platform activity on Redrob or equivalent
negative: Perfect-on-paper but unreachable — treat as not actually available

ideal_candidate_profile.narrative: 6–8 years total, 4–5 in applied ML/AI at product companies; has shipped at least one end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation system to real users at meaningful scale; holds defensible opinions on retrieval, evaluation, and LLM integration backed by systems they actually built.
location: or willing to relocate within India

notice_period.note: Bar gets meaningfully higher for 30+ day notice candidates

do: Reason beyond keyword matching — infer retrieval/ranking expertise from project descriptions and career history
Prefer shipped production systems over framework familiarity or skill-list keywords
Prefer demonstrated impact and scale over self-reported proficiency
Downweight candidates inactive for 6+ months regardless of profile quality
Detect consulting-firm-only careers and apply strong_negative_signal penalty even if AI keywords are present
avoid: Treating a perfect skill list as a substitute for career trajectory evidence

trap_awareness.example_false_positive: Marketing Manager with all AI keywords in skills section — not a fit regardless of list
trap_awareness.example_false_negative: Candidate who never writes 'RAG' or 'Pinecone' but built a hybrid retrieval system at a product company — strong Tier 1 fit

first_90_days.weeks_1_3: Audit existing system (BM25 + rule-based scoring); identify 3–4 highest-leverage improvements
first_90_days.weeks_4_8: Ship v2 ranking system with embeddings, hybrid retrieval, and LLM-based re-ranking (architecture is candidate's call); must demonstrably improve recruiter-engagement metrics
first_90_days.weeks_9_12: Build evaluation infrastructure — offline benchmarks, online A/B testing, recruiter-feedback loops — so the team can keep improving without flying blind

jd_summary.core_message: Find an applied AI engineer with production retrieval/ranking experience, strong evaluation rigor, product-company background, current coding ability, and startup execution mindset.
jd_summary.culture_fit_importance: Explicitly stated as higher than skills fit at this stage
